unavailable_text: 2003-09-23	MOTION TO SEEK EMPLOYMENT ON SEP-23-2003 AS TO FATHER ABEL DEL TORO NO APPEARANCE. BENCH WARRANT OF ARREST ORDERED ISSUED WITH $1,500.00 CASH ONLY BAIL AND RESTRICTED RETURN ON TUESDAY MORNING.
message: 2003-09-23 MOTION TO SEEK EMPLOYMENT ON SEP-23-2003 AS TO FATHER ABEL DEL TORO NO APPEARANCE. BENCH WARRANT OF ARREST ORDERED ISSUED WITH $1,500.00 CASH ONLY BAIL AND RESTRICTED RETURN ON TUESDAY MORNING.
